## ¬ß3. Binding physics-correctness rules (grounded in 02_Surfur_Polymer docs; DO NOT violate)
1. Measurement = transient current I(t) under applied V, **Curie‚Äďvon Schweidler power-law
   I(t) ‚ąĚ t‚ĀĽ‚ĀŅ** (n‚ąą(0,2)); I=V/R so I‚Üď ‚áí R‚ÜĎ. t>~2s = pure trap-mediated absorption current.
2. **n = the BREADTH of the trap energy distribution, NOT trap density.** Magnitude is a
   separate metric ŌĀ60s. (n=density would be WRONG.)
3. **Carrier is sign-agnostic** ‚ÄĒ dispersive trap-controlled transport in a disordered solid
   (Scher‚ÄďMontroll for n>1, Jonscher for n‚Č§1). Do NOT commit to electron vs hole; do NOT draw
   a clean band/ballistic-drift picture (no net +‚Üí‚ąí carrier drift).
4. Traps are a **broad continuous distribution** at high sulfur; **discrete shallow/deep at
   low sulfur**. The discrete‚Üícontinuous evolution with sulfur IS the mechanism (CvS_Analysis_
   Strategy.md). Do NOT draw 2 fixed discrete levels for all compositions.
5. **Do NOT encode "stronger trapping" as well DEPTH** (depth reads as magnitude, contradicts
   n=breadth). Use breadth + ŌĀ60s only.
6. "S‚ÄďS radical / sulfur cluster" trap chemistry is **NOT established** ‚ÄĒ illustrative only,
   never asserted. Unlabeled √ó marks for trap sites are correct.
7. Use 'trap-energy distribution / landscape', NOT 'trap network' (network asserts spatial
   percolation, a stronger/different claim).
